title: Process Engineer
description:
We are looking for a Process Engineer to join our dynamic team at CEI Pte. Ltd. You have the opportunity to work with a creative and collaborative team at the forefront of technology.


Job Duties and Responsibilities:

  • Be a technical specialist in developing EMS manufacturing solution of Box Build and System Level Assembly capability and capacity to meet customer deliverables.
  • Participate in RFQ phase to provide manufacturing quote, to meet customer product specifications and cost expectation.
  • Understand customer requirement and develop manufacturing plan of NPI project to meet customer deliverables.
  • aExecute NPI activities includes project plan (Gantt Chart), process setup, layout & validation and develop the documentation (Process Flow, PFMEA, Control Plan, WI).
  • Coordinate and work with Manufacturing Technical Staffs for the First Article run & qualification.

Requirements:

  • Diploma/Degree in Mechatronics / Electronic / Mechanical Engineering or equivalent.
  • Preferably 3-5 years in Cable Hardness & System Level Assembly and Testing EMS working experience.
  • Proficient in Microsoft Office (Excel, Power Point).
  • Proficient in BOM, 3D CAD and Schematic diagram.
  • Experience in FMEA, SPC, DOE and 8D reports.
  • Good analytical skill and effective communication with customers and internal stakeholders.
  • Able to travel occasionally for site support.

A Rewarding Place

You have the opportunity to work with a creative and collaborative team at the forefront of technology, trends and practices. We are huge advocates for career development and our global operations provide opportunity for professional mobility. Be inspired to grow your abilities, learn from experiences and build the skills you need to forge ahead.

Equal Opportunity Employer

CEI, an AEM Company, is an equal opportunity employer committed to promoting and maintaining a diverse, equitable and inclusive environment where differences are valued and encouraged. We employ individuals who align with our values and meet the requirements of the role. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment.


Join Our Team!

Are you looking for an exciting opportunity to grow and contribute in a dynamic environment? We’d love to chat with you!

If you're interested in this internship opportunity, don’t hesitate - apply now, and let's start a conversation. We’re eager to hear about your skills, experiences, and what you can bring to the team.

Looking forward to meeting you!

postedCompany.description: We are a reliable manufacturing partner for OEMs in the clusters of display products, analytical & medical instruments, commercial & industrial equipment, semiconductor equipment in Europe, USA, Japan and Asia. Our principal activity is to provide one stop solution for equipment manufacturing. With total customer satisfaction as our number one objective, we are looking for dynamic and dedicated professionals who seek to build a partnership of excellence.
postedCompany.name: CEI PTE. LTD.
